.in_sonic_pi? ⇒ Boolean

# File 'lib/spiseq/external/sonic_pi.rb', line 81

def in_sonic_pi?
  ensure_inited
  !@spi.nil?
end

.spi_call(method, *args, **kwargs, &block) ⇒ Object

Make a direct call to a method on the Sonic Pi context. Only for use by tests, to call methods that would not otherwise be exposed.



88
89
90
91
92
 
# File 'lib/spiseq/external/sonic_pi.rb', line 88

def spi_call(method, *args, **kwargs, &block)
  ensure_inited
  raise RuntimeError, "not in Sonic Pi" if @spi.nil?
  @spi.send(method, *args, **kwargs, &block)
end
